disambiguated.context: Reem Hosseini and Imani Mosley were driving to the restaurant but got into a fender bender on their way there. This resulted in a screaming match in the middle of the road. Imani Mosley got out of the car and started yelling at the other driver while Reem Hosseini sat back embarrassed.
disambiguated.question: Who stayed in the car?
